title: Bridge Paper: Allostatic-Interoceptive Overload in Frontotemporal Dementia.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.
**Phase context:** interoception, interoceptive, heart-brain, vagal, insula, cardiorespiratory, breathing entrainment

Paper: Allostatic-Interoceptive Overload in Frontotemporal Dementia.
DOI: 10.1016/j.biopsych.2022.02.955
Abstract: BACKGROUND: The predictive coding theory of allostatic-interoceptive load states that brain networks mediating autonomic regulation and interoceptive-exteroceptive balance regulate the internal milieu to anticipate future needs and environmental demands. These functions seem to be distinctly compromised in behavioral variant frontotemporal dementia (bvFTD), including alterations of the allostatic-interoceptive network (AIN). Here, we hypothesize that bvFTD is typified by an allostatic-interocept
